title: HPC Graph Probabilistic Edge v1
description: Row manifest for a probabilistic, state-conditioned blast-graph edge, suitable for both constellation neighbor edges and network/policy graphs.

edgeId.description: Optional primary key; usually assigned by SQLite on insert.

snapshotId.description: Foreign key into the graph snapshot this edge belongs to.

sourceNodeId.description: Source node in the blast graph.

targetNodeId.description: Target node in the blast graph.

scope.description: Scope for this edge; combines spatial and network scopes.

distance.description: Graph or spatial distance; semantics depend on scope.

edgeKind.description: High-level edge kind used by blast and policy logic.

enabled.description: 1 if this edge is currently considered during traversals.

successProb.description: Estimated success probability for this edge (Bernoulli link).

isIntermittent.description: 1 if this edge is intermittent (e.g., VPN link with frequent flaps).

requiresConntrack.description: 1 if this edge becomes active only when a matching conntrack state exists.

governanceFlags.description: Bitfield for governance properties (HS boundary, egress, consent required, etc.).

propertiesJson.description: Opaque JSON string with module-specific details or annotations.
